subcodes.first_line: We have hearkened unto thy call and that which thou hast mentioned unto Him Who is the Remembrance of the worlds, and from thy letter have We perceived the fragrance of thy love for thy Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد سمعنا ندائک و ما ذکرت به مذکور العالمین و وجدنا من کتابک عرف حبک مولیک
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @knowledge; recognition of God, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation
